channel.title: bpleone.com — Pokemon TCG Trading Desk
channel.description: Daily market brief + STRONG BUY signals from Brandon P. Leone's personal trading desk.

item.title: Market Brief · Friday, May 15, 2026
item.description:
Tracking **774 cards** · **555** live-priced (72% coverage) · 84 STRONG BUYs flagged today.

**Trade of the Day: Lugia VSTAR Alt Art** (PSA 10) — $820 live, quant score **75/100**, signal **STRONG BUY**. Silver Tempest.

Top algo picks right now: **Mega Gengar ex SIR**, **Birthday Pikachu Promo**, **Umbreon VMAX (Moonbreon)**. Each scoring 75+ and trading under $5K.

Algo flags to trim/skip: **Charizard Base Unlimited**, **Umbreon VMAX Alt (Japanese)**, **Mewtwo Base Unlimited**. Score-rank suggests caution.

Coverage is at **72%** — the next 4-hour cron run will auto-discover PriceCharting URLs for the remaining 219 cards. Real-time 30-day deltas activate after 5 days of live tracking.
